name: donor-segmentation
description: Segments the alumni donor base into behavioral clusters using K-means, then scores each segment for major gift upgrade likelihood using Random Forest. Outputs segment assignments and predicted upgrade probabilities for the annual fund and major gifts teams.

inputs.label: Donor Giving History (S3 path)
inputs.description: S3 URI to a CSV with columns: donor_id, gift_amount, gift_date, fund_code, consecutive_years, upgraded (0/1 for last cycle).

inputs.label: Number of Donor Segments
inputs.description: Number of K-means clusters (2–8). 4 is typical: lapsed, annual, loyal mid-level, major.

inputs.label: Clustering Feature Columns
inputs.description: Numeric columns used as K-means features.

inputs.label: Upgrade Label Column
inputs.description: Binary column (0/1) indicating whether the donor upgraded last cycle.

inputs.label: Upgrade Prediction Feature Columns
inputs.description: Columns used as inputs to the upgrade prediction model.

steps.description: Score donors for major gift upgrade likelihood
Wait for upgrade scoring to complete

outputs.description: Donor records with cluster_id (0–k) and distance to centroid
Donor records with predicted_class (upgraded/not) and predicted_prob_upgraded; feature importances
